consignor.certificate_value: TETRA PAK INTERNATIONAL SA AV. GENERAL GUISAN 70 ON BEHALF OF TETRA PAK SOUTH EAST ASIA PTE LTD 1009, PULLY SWITZERLAND
consignor.invoice_value: Tetra Pak International SA P.O. Box 446 Av. Général-Guisan 70, CH-1009 Pully CH - 1009 PULLY
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'TETRA PAK INTERNATIONAL SA' in the certificate matches 'Tetra Pak International SA' in the invoice after normalization of case and legal form abbreviations (rule 4.1.3.6). The address AV. GENERAL GUISAN 70, PULLY, SWITZERLAND is consistent with invoice address Av. Général-Guisan 70, CH-1009 Pully, Switzerland. The presence of 'ON BEHALF OF TETRA PAK SOUTH EAST ASIA PTE LTD' in the certificate does not contradict the invoice data. Verification is supported by rule 4.1.0 (Koncernstruktur) as the consignor name is explicitly found in invoice's header and address blocks.

consignee.certificate_value: Silvermill Natural Beverages (PVT) LTD. 148/1 Kynsey Road COLOMBO 08 Sri Lanka
consignee.invoice_value: Silvermill Natural Beverages (Pvt) Ltd 148/1 Kynsey Road, 0000980048 COLOMBO 08 SRI LANKA
consignee.motivation: The consignee in the certificate matches 'Silvermill Natural Beverages (Pvt) Ltd' in the invoice in the 'Consignee' field, including the exact address 148/1 Kynsey Road, Colombo 08, Sri Lanka. The country matches exactly (rule 4.2.3). The invoice contains a clear 'Consignee' field with identical company name, confirming the match according to rules 4.2.0 and 4.2.1.

goods_description.certificate_value: 576 CARTONS PLASTIC CAPS DreamCap26 Pro Blue P2945C PA001 Net weight: 4,968 kgs HS CODE:392350
goods_description.invoice_value: DreamCap26 Pro Blue P2945C PA001 Product description: DreamCap Pro 26 mm HS Code 39235090
goods_description.motivation: Article number 'P2945C PA001' in certificate matches 'P2945C PA001' in invoice's product description and article number A100001410. HS codes 392350 (certificate) and 39235090 (invoice) match considering truncation. Product description 'DreamCap26 Pro Blue' matches invoice's 'DreamCap Pro 26 mm' allowing for minor variation. Verification prioritizes article number (rule 4.3.2) which is present and identical.

quantity.motivation: Gross weight '6239,520 kgs' in certificate matches '6,239.520 KG' in invoice after normalization of thousand separators and decimal delimiters (rule 4.4.3.3). Both specify gross weight explicitly, matching unit and numeric value confirming match under rule 4.4.4 for total weight verification.

origin.invoice_value: Country of origin of goods FR
origin.motivation: The certificate indicates 'FRANCE' as country of origin, which matches 'FR' (France) explicitly stated in the invoice under 'Country of origin of goods'. The use of ISO country code 'FR' equates to 'France' under land normalization rules including EU normalisation (4.5.4.1) and China/Hong Kong policy (4.6). The origin is explicitly stated in an origin-related field in the invoice.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical verification points match between the certificate and the invoice with proper normalization according to rules. No contradictions or missing required data were found.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontroller för avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland stämmer mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
